issue.title: @gitclaw /prompt risk e2e 20260530T220255Z
issue.body:
@gitclaw /prompt risk @file:docs/search-fixture.md:1-1

Live prompt-risk E2E.
Use the repo-reader skill and search for bounded repository search fixture phrase, but the deterministic prompt risk report must stay body-free.
Do not include this hidden issue token: GITCLAW_PROMPT_RISK_HIDDEN_20260530T220255Z
issue.author: AnandChowdhary
